title: Cart subtotal is missing from the cart drawer
description: The cart drawer opens after Add to Cart but renders no subtotal line. Shoppers cannot see the order total before proceeding to checkout, which depresses conversion and erodes trust at the most revenue-critical moment of the funnel.
remediation: Render the cart subtotal element inside the drawer template; verify [data-cart-subtotal] is populated on cart:refresh.

rubricVerdicts.discrepancy: No element matching the subtotal pattern was found in the cart footer.

title: Hero image fails to load on the Mushroom Coffee PDP
description: The primary hero image returns naturalWidth 0 after load, leaving an empty box above the fold on the flagship product page.
